element_introduction_order.mastery_context: foundational; all levels build on punch and throw mechanics
double-tap directional input required; high damage smash variant
standing close to enemies enables this; useful for crowd control
auto-scrolling requires timing; can be knocked off by other players or hazards
enables kick attacks and BT Bashing Ball shape-shift; context-specific moves
only available while hanging; smash variant: Swingin' Size Thirteens
2D platforming stages only; smash variant: Jawbuster
two-stage finishing combo; Big Bad Boot smash variant powerful against bosses
walker legs, raven beaks, pipes, flagpoles; temporary pickups
pattern memorization; speed increases as level progresses
gravity-based; can perform super high jumps if touched while ascending
maze navigation under time pressure; collision hazards
falling into pit = death if screen not scrolling; collision detection exploitable
altered movement physics; distinct hazard set
input-frame precision; pattern attacks; infinite HP rats require bomb+boot combo

typical_relief_triggers: safe walking/combat sections between hazard zones
fly pickups to restore hit points
vehicle sections with scripted progression (temporary control surrender)
typical_tension_triggers: obstacle course speed ramps (increasing difficulty within single level)
boss fights with pattern requirements and infinite health
collision detection-heavy snake maze and rope sections
multiple simultaneous enemies in confined space
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: extreme difficulty spikes paired with varied gameplay modes; tension sustained by level-specific mechanic learning curves; relief from mechanics variability between levels; obstacle courses feature internal pacing acceleration

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: mega warp points hidden in 4 levels; enable skipping 2 levels when reached
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: mega warps require exploration beyond main path or specific jump/timing sequences

difficulty_curve.early_game: Level 1-3: Introduction to combat mechanics and first vehicle section (jet); manageable enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Level 4-8: Escalating hazard complexity; introduction of obstacle courses with speed ramps, rope mechanics, vehicle variety; first major spike at Turbo Tunnel (Level 2) notorious for frame-perfect timing requirements
difficulty_curve.late_game: Level 9-13: Sustained extreme difficulty; tower descent sections with pit-death mechanics, unicycle maze racing, final boss tower climb, culminating in Dark Queen fight requiring pattern mastery and boss-kill mechanics
notable_spikes: Level 2 Turbo Tunnel: automotive obstacle course with frame-perfect timing; historically known as extreme difficulty spike
Level 6 Section 3: snake bending collision detection causes major slowdown and navigation complexity
Level 10: Rat boss with infinite health requiring specific bomb+boot finisher sequence
Level 13: Dark Queen final boss with multi-phase pattern combat

notable_level_patterns.description: Speed increases progressively within single level section; dodging mandatory; no attack opportunity during sprint; pattern memorization required
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 6 Intruder Excluder (snake maze sections); Level 2 Turbo Tunnel

notable_level_patterns.description: Player mounted on jet/surfboard/unicycle; directional control limited; screen scrolls automatically; collision with hazards forces dismount or death
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 3 Jet Plane, Level 5 Surf City, Level 8 Terra Tubes maze

notable_level_patterns.description: Isometric or 2D platforming with upward/downward movement focus; narrow paths; falling hazards; rope/hanging sections interleaved
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 9 descent hanging sections, Level 11 tower climb, Level 13 Dark Queen tower

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal scrolling; multiple enemies on screen; melee combat with pickable environmental weapons; smash hit variants unlock at attack completion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1, Level 4 segments, Level 7 non-underwater sections

notable_level_patterns.description: Single enemy with high HP or special mechanics; requires specific attack sequence or external trigger (bomb detonation); frame-perfect input windows
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 10 Rat Boss (infinite HP, bomb+boot kill requirement), Level 13 Dark Queen multi-phase

notable_level_patterns.description: Attacks only function in specific level environments (hanging, 2D vertical, etc.); mechanics introduce and retire per level
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 2 hanging kick-only attacks; Level 4+ uppercut 2D sections; Level 5 super-jump vehicle interaction
